C:\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\test_maths.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\test_maths.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\test_maths.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test_maths.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o C:\Users\mateo\Universidad\Master\FinTech\TFM\montecarlo\build\test_maths.exe -Wl,--out-implib,C:\Users\mateo\Universidad\Master\FinTech\TFM\montecarlo\build\libtest_maths.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test_maths.dir\linkLibs.rsp
